default.description: Default permissions for Hot Sheet (local content). HS-8828: the app-command allow-<cmd> grants mirror remote-localhost.json so that if registering commands via build.rs AppManifest switches app commands to explicit-permission mode, local windows keep their access too.

remote-localhost.description: Allow IPC from the localhost origin so the Node-served frontend can call Tauri core APIs AND the app's own commands. HS-8828: Tauri 2.11 stopped auto-allowing app commands for remote-origin webviews, so each command (generated as allow-<cmd> via build.rs AppManifest) is granted explicitly here.
